# BROS Wisata — North Sumatra Tour Operator
# https://broswisata.id
# llms.txt — Machine-readable site summary for AI search engines
# Format: https://llmstxt.org

> BROS Wisata (PT BROS INTI WISATA) is a licensed tour operator based in Medan, 
> North Sumatra, Indonesia. We specialize in authentic North Sumatra experiences 
> for travelers from Malaysia, Singapore, and Europe. Founded in 2005.
> Contact: WhatsApp +62-812-6013-9399 | hello@broswisata.id

## About

- Company: PT BROS INTI WISATA (NIB 2502250049355)
- Founded: 2005
- Base: Medan, North Sumatra, Indonesia
- Address: Jl. Ring Road No. 117 B, Medan Sunggal, Sumatera Utara 20122
- Phone / WhatsApp: +62-812-6013-9399
- Email: hello@broswisata.id
- Operating hours: Monday–Saturday 09:00–18:00 WIB (UTC+7)
- Languages: Bahasa Indonesia, Bahasa Melayu, English
- Specialization: North Sumatra ecotourism, cultural tours, halal travel, car rental with driver

## Tour Packages

### Signature 5 Packages (Most Popular)

**Medan Heritage Tour 3D2N**
- Focus: Colonial history, Chinese temples, Malay culture, local cuisine
- Highlights: Tjong A Fie Mansion, Maimoon Palace, Masjid Raya, Kampung Keling
- URL: https://broswisata.id/en/paket-medan_heritage_3h2m
- PDF: https://broswisata.id/assets/pdf/berastagi_3h2m.pdf

**Bukit Lawang Orangutan Tour 4D3N**
- Focus: Wild orangutan trekking in UNESCO Gunung Leuser National Park
- Highlights: Orangutan trekking, Bahorok River tubing, jungle eco-lodge
- Suitable for: All fitness levels, family-friendly, halal-friendly
- URL: https://broswisata.id/en/paket-bukit_lawang_4h3m
- PDF: https://broswisata.id/assets/pdf/bukit_lawang_4h3m.pdf

**Tangkahan Eco Tour 3D2N**
- Focus: Elephant bathing, jungle trekking, bat caves
- Highlights: Tangkahan "Hidden Paradise", elephant sanctuary, bat cave exploration
- URL: https://broswisata.id/en/paket-tangkahan_3h2m
- PDF: https://broswisata.id/assets/pdf/tangkahan_3h2m.pdf

**Berastagi Highland Tour 3D2N**
- Focus: Volcanic highlands, Karo Batak culture, fruit orchards
- Highlights: Mt Sibayak hike, Lingga traditional village, fruit market
- URL: https://broswisata.id/en/paket-berastagi_3h2m
- PDF: https://broswisata.id/assets/pdf/berastagi_3h2m.pdf

**Sumut Grand Combo 6D5N** (Most Comprehensive)
- Focus: Complete North Sumatra — jungle + highlands + lake
- Highlights: Bukit Lawang + Tangkahan + Berastagi + Lake Toba + Samosir Island
- URL: https://broswisata.id/en/paket-combo_sumut_6h5m
- PDF: https://broswisata.id/assets/pdf/combo_sumut_6h5m.pdf

### Halal Malaysia Packages (For Malaysian Muslim Travelers)

All halal packages include:
- Halal-certified restaurants throughout
- Malay-speaking guides
- Prayer time accommodations (masjid/surau stops)
- Halal hotel recommendations (3-tier: budget/mid/premium)
- MYR pricing available (PDF brochures)

**Halal Medan-Toba 3D2N**
- URL: https://broswisata.id/ms/paket-halal_3h2m_medan_toba
- PDF (MYR): https://broswisata.id/assets/pdf/Pakej_3H2M_MYR_v2.pdf

**Halal Medan-Toba 4D3N**
- URL: https://broswisata.id/ms/paket-halal_4h3m_medan_toba
- PDF (MYR): https://broswisata.id/assets/pdf/Pakej_4H3M_MYR_v2.pdf

**Halal Medan-Toba 5D4N** (Best for Malaysian Families)
- URL: https://broswisata.id/ms/paket-halal_5h4m_medan_toba
- PDF (MYR): https://broswisata.id/assets/pdf/Pakej_5H4M_MYR_v2.pdf

## Car Rental with Driver

- Service area: Medan city, North Sumatra province, Kualanamu Airport (KNO)
- Fleet: Toyota Avanza (4 pax), Toyota Innova (6 pax), Toyota Hiace (12 pax), Toyota Alphard (VIP)
- Services: Airport transfer, day tour, multi-day road trip, point-to-point
- URL: https://broswisata.id/en/bros-wisata-car-rental

## Custom Tours

- We design custom itineraries for any duration, group size, and budget
- Specialties: Family tours, honeymoon tours, corporate retreats, photography tours
- URL: https://broswisata.id/en/bros-wisata-custom-tour

## Key Facts for Travelers

**From Malaysia:**
- Malaysians get 30-day visa-free entry to Indonesia
- Kualanamu International Airport (KNO) serves direct flights from Kuala Lumpur (KUL/SZB), Penang (PEN), Johor Bahru (JHB)
- Flight time: Medan–KL ~1.5 hours
- Currency: Indonesian Rupiah (IDR). 1 MYR ≈ 3,500 IDR (approximate, check current rate)
- North Sumatra is majority Muslim — halal food widely available
- Malay language is mutually intelligible with Indonesian — communication easy

**From Europe:**
- Kualanamu (KNO) connects via Kuala Lumpur (KUL), Singapore (SIN), or Jakarta (CGK)
- Total flight time from Europe: 14–18 hours with 1 stopover
- Visa-on-arrival available for most European passports (30 days, USD 35)
- Best season: April–October (dry season, best for outdoor activities)
- North Sumatra is one of Southeast Asia's last frontiers for eco-travelers

**General:**
- All packages: Quote on Request (QOR) — price varies by group size, hotel tier, season
- Minimum booking: 2 persons (solo travelers can join shared groups)
- Payment: Bank transfer, Wise, PayPal, cash
- Cancellation: Free up to 14 days before departure

## Destinations

- **Bukit Lawang**: UNESCO Gunung Leuser National Park, orangutan rehabilitation center, Bahorok River. 3.5 hours from Medan.
- **Tangkahan**: Sumatran elephant sanctuary, jungle trekking, bat caves, hidden waterfalls. 4 hours from Medan.
- **Berastagi**: Karo Batak highland town, Mt Sibayak (active volcano, hikeable), fruit orchards, Lingga village. 2 hours from Medan.
- **Lake Toba**: World's largest volcanic lake (caldera), Samosir Island, Batak culture, King Sidabutar tombs. 4.5 hours from Medan.
- **Medan**: Capital of North Sumatra, multicultural food scene, colonial architecture, Tjong A Fie Mansion, Maimoon Palace.
